title: Nancy Drew and the Hidden Staircase
original_title: Nancy Drew and the Hidden Staircase
overview: Nancy Drew, a smart high schooler with a penchant for keen observation and deduction, stumbles upon the haunting of a local home. A bit of an outsider struggling to fit into her new surroundings, Nancy and her pals set out to solve the mystery, make new friends, and establish their place in the community
